propositions: Epic/story acceptance criteria should state the outcome (children closed, work landed) and never demand child signatures such as 'closed (signed)'.
Restating signature status as an AC defeats the completion gate's certifiable:false soft path, converting a PASS-but-unsigned parent into a hard FAIL.
The no-signature-demands-in-ACs rule must be documented in CLAUDE.md's ticket-template section and the relevant plan-review/llm-framework docs with rationale.
The documentation must cross-reference bug 02a3 and the bf50/5f39 force-close incident as the motivating case.
Optionally add a P-tier DET lint warning on 'signed' inside a container ticket's AC checklist line, only if it fits an existing DET seam.
